## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows ESLint rules (`npm run lint` passes)
- [ ] Code formatted with Prettier (`npm run format`)
- [ ] No API keys or secrets in code
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] Tested locally in Chrome extension
